mapper.sql: id, username, email, academic_id, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, gender, school, bio, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})

SELECT
FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
